summary_description: The Purchase Requisition (PR-2026-007842) contains no line items, therefore it cannot accurately reflect the quote. This results in critical failures for line count alignment and item matching.
failure_reasons: PR line count does not align with quote (0 vs 2).
No PR items to semantically match against quote.
No PR items to check manufacturer against quote.

sub_checks.name: 4.4 Line Count Alignment (PR <= Quote, all matched)
4.6 Scope Coverage - Services (PR within SOW scope)

field_level_assessment.detail: No line items found on the Purchase Requisition to compare against the quote.
PR has 0 lines, Quote has 2 lines. The PR does not reflect the quote.
Cannot perform semantic match as PR has no line items.
Cannot perform manufacturer match as PR has no line items.
The PR is for products, not services. The intended product category (IT Hardware: End User Computing) is covered by the MSA. This check is effectively N/A for services, hence marked as pass.

evidence.pr_value: No line items present on PR.

evidence.extracted_value: Lenovo ThinkPad P16 Gen 2 Mobile Workstation Intel Core i7-13850HX (24C/32T, 5.3GHz), 32GB DDR5-5600, 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe, NVIDIA RTX A1000 6GB, 16" WQXGA IPS 400nit, IR+FHD Cam, Fingerprint, Wi-Fi 6E, BT 5.3, Win 11 Pro, 3-Year Premier Onsite Warranty
Lenovo ThinkPad Universal Thunderbolt 4 Dock 4x USB-A 3.2, 1x USB-C 3.2, 2x Thunderbolt 4 (downstream), 2x HDMI 2.1, 1x DP 1.4a, 1x RJ45 2.5GbE, 135W PD, Kensington Nano Lock Slot

policy_reference: Data Quality Standards v2.0; Check 4 Item Description Match §4.1–4.6
agent_recommendation: The Purchase Requisition (PR-2026-007842) is missing all line items. It cannot be processed as it does not specify what is being requested. Please amend the PR to include the requested items as per the attached quote (Q25-0847-MTECH) before resubmission.
